ralph-alerts.name: Ralph Alerts
ralph-alerts.use: Ralph errors, stalls, restarts, health issues

wins.name: Wins and Celebrations
wins.use: issues closed, PRs merged, milestones, birthdays

pr-code.name: PR and Code
pr-code.use: PR opened, reviews needed, CI failures, merges

_routing_notes.webhook_fallback: The incoming webhook URL in $USERPROFILE\.squad\teams-webhook.url always posts to the 'general' channel (tamir-squads-notifications). When agents have Teams MCP tools, they should post directly to the correct channel using channelId.
_routing_notes.neelix_channel_hint: Neelix output should include 'CHANNEL: <key>' (e.g., CHANNEL: wins) so routing middleware or agent mode can direct the message to the right channel.
_routing_notes.birthday_channel: Birthday notifications should go to 'wins' (Wins and Celebrations).
_routing_notes.brady_squad_team: Brady's Squad product team also has a 'Squad Tech News' channel (teamId: 1de78cdf-3f73-4447-9601-a940bd98b80d, channelId: 19:c940af255e22486882c069d7b38a6204@thread.tacv2) that should receive the same tech news as squads/Tech News.
